mapper.select: SELECT DN as dn ,SERIAL as serial ,OBJECTCLASS as objectclass ,CN as cn ,SN as sn ,MAIL as mail ,USERID as userid ,TIMEID as timeid ,RAFLAG as raflag ,STATUS as status ,POLICY as policy ,CID as cid ,ISSUEDATE as issuedate ,EXPIREDATE as expiredate ,USERCERTIFICATE as usercertificate FROM LDAP_INFO WHERE USERID = #{userid} WITH UR

SELECT DN as dn ,SERIAL as serial ,OBJECTCLASS as objectclass ,CN as cn ,SN as sn ,MAIL as mail ,USERID as userid ,TIMEID as timeid ,RAFLAG as raflag ,STATUS as status ,POLICY as policy ,CID as cid ,ISSUEDATE as issuedate ,EXPIREDATE as expiredate ,USERCERTIFICATE as usercertificate FROM LDAP_INFO WHERE SERIAL = #{serial} WITH UR
